summary: 2026-06-07 06:55:09 PDT: The I1 diffstat removal is directionally correct, but the updated /review steps now ask for a gate result before the gate is run. I ran the requested diff/log and read the story spec; `bash tests/guard_test.sh` could not be verified in this read-only sandbox because its temp repo setup was denied by filesystem permissions.

findings.title: Build note asks for gate result before running the gate
findings.claim: Step 2 now instructs the runner to append a build note containing the gate result, but Step 3 is where `testCommand` is actually run. Following the documented order makes it impossible to truthfully record the current gate result in Step 2, which can lead to stale or out-of-order review records.
findings.suggestion: Move the gate step before the build-note step, or change Step 2 to gather the AC map and append/update the build note only after Step 3 has produced the gate result.

findings.title: AC10 test note still says five files
findings.claim: The updated AC10 allows six paths, including `.claude/skills/review/SKILL.md` and this story file, but the test note still says `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` must show only the five files listed. That makes the verification note inconsistent with the updated acceptance criterion.
findings.suggestion: Update the test note to say six files, or list the expected paths explicitly.
